description_long: This is a retro-styled countertop mixer with a smooth, rounded body finished in a pastel blue and cream color scheme. The main chassis is robust and houses a large, metallic mixing bowl that sits securely beneath a fixed mixing head. A prominent control knob and a small button are located on the right side, allowing for manual adjustment of mixing speed and operation. The mixer features a horizontal drum orientation, with the bowl easily accessible from the front. The overall design is sleek and enclosed, with no visible wheels or external moving parts. The surface appears hard and smooth, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly.
description: A pastel blue and cream countertop mixer with a metallic bowl, control knob, and a sleek, retro design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the control knob, button, and the full profile of the metallic mixing bowl.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the rounded back and the mixer’s compact, enclosed chassis.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted body and the bowl’s attachment.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open access to the metallic bowl and the symmetrical design.
attribute_control_panel_type: analog dial with a single button
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with rounded edges and a retro aesthetic
